 A Abb

overlay:

AAAAdd

notes: overwrite copies every overlapping cell, overlay copies only the non-blank ones (spaces skipped), and copywin copies a rectangle -- the merged destination grids match libncursesw cell-for-cell (upgrades OVERLAY.NOOUTPUT, which only checked the empty immediate-output contract).
oracle_method: link one overwrite/overlay/copywin C program against libncurses_cabi + the generated curses.h and against libncursesw; read the destination windows back with mvwinch and compare the merged grids
